global_description: A medium-sized bird with a robust body, featuring a striking combination of bright blue wings and back, a white breast, and a rich chestnut head. The beak is long and pointed, colored bright red, and the legs are short and red. The plumage is glossy, giving it a vibrant appearance.

part_details.head: Rich chestnut color, rounded shape with a glossy texture.
part_details.beak: Long, pointed, bright red, smooth surface.
part_details.breast: White, smooth, contrasting with the chestnut head.

spatial_relations: The bright blue wings extend from the sides of the chestnut head.
The white breast is positioned below the chestnut head.
The long red beak protrudes from the front of the head.
